task: Fixing MidpointX boot and stability issues

patterns_identified.insight: Using 'cd dir && npm script' in package.json can fail on Windows if the shell used by npm (or the user) is PowerShell. Using 'npm run script --prefix dir' is more robust and portable.
Re-initializing node-telegram-bot-api without awaiting stopPolling() can lead to overlapping polling loops and ECONNRESET errors, especially during hot-reloading development.

patterns_identified.pattern: MCP Stdio Transport Shutdown on Windows
patterns_identified.insight: Python-based MCP servers often throw noisy KeyboardInterrupt tracebacks when their stdio pipes are closed abruptly. A timeout on client.close() helps the parent process continue its shutdown sequence if the child is slow to exit.

corrections_made: Changed package.json ui script to use --prefix.
Made TelegramService.init async and awaited stopPolling.
Added 2s timeout to MCP client closure in PluginRegistry.
